description: Main entry point for a Flutter application implementing a Smart Notes Manager. It sets up app-wide state management and theme configuration.

classes.name: SmartNotesApp
classes.description: Root widget of the app, setting up state management and theme.

methods.name: main
methods.description: Application entry point, which runs the app.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the widget tree for the SmartNotesApp, setting up providers and MaterialApp.
